name: browserslist-config
description: Gravity UI shared Browserslist configuration that targets modern browsers used by Gravity UI packages. Covers last 2 major versions, full ES6 support, Firefox ESR, and excludes dead, Opera Mini, QQ, and UC browsers.
when_to_use: Configuring browser targets for a Gravity UI project to match the design system's support matrix
Ensuring consistent autoprefixer and babel-preset-env targets across packages
When you need a sensible modern browser baseline without configuring queries manually
avoid: Do not use if your project must support legacy browsers (IE11, older Safari) — the config excludes dead browsers
For highly customized audiences, extend rather than replace the config
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev @gravity-ui/browserslist-config`. Add to `package.json`: `{ "browserslist": ["extends @gravity-ui/browserslist-config"] }`. Additional browser queries can be appended after the extends entry.
browser_query: last 2 major versions and last 2 years and fully supports es6 and >0.05%, not dead, not op_mini all, not and_qq >0, not and_uc >0, Firefox ESR, Chrome >0 and last 2 years and >0.05%, Safari >0 and last 2 years and >0.05%, Firefox >0 and last 2 years and >0.01%
